meta.name: VisualAI ASL Hand Landmark Dataset
meta.description: Synthetically generated + augmented dataset for American Sign Language A–Z recognition using MediaPipe hand landmarks

landmarks.coordinate_system: Normalized: origin at wrist (lm[0]), scale = dist(lm[0], lm[9]). x: right=positive, y: up=negative (screen coords), z: depth

meta.source: Synthetically generated from geometric ASL hand models with 10 augmented variants per letter
